description: Mungiki is a banned ethnic organization in Kenya, originating in the late 1980s among Kikuyu youth. It promotes a return to traditional Kikuyu customs and resistance to Westernization, and has been involved in ethnic violence, anti-government resistance, and criminal activities such as protection racketeering. The group is secretive and operates through a cell structure, with a reported peak membership of 500,000. It was banned by the Kenyan government.
